The Story

From Execution
to Strategy

I didn't start with a plan. I started with a job. My early exposure in a Finance & Loan Department taught me something textbooks skip — trust is the only real product. You don't sell a loan. You sell confidence and reliability.

Then came Reliance. Ground-level sales. Real rejections. Real conversions. I learned that revenue isn't a slide in a pitch deck — it's built through daily discipline, customer empathy, and ruthless execution.

That experience sparked a question: why do most businesses struggle to grow despite having great products? The answer was almost always marketing. So I built Glorify Digital — a digital marketing agency helping brands grow through SEO, Social Media, Paid Ads, and Content Strategy.

Today I'm a BBA student (2025–28) at Allenhouse Group of Institutions, Kanpur, preparing for CAT 2027 with a clear destination: a top IIM, then MBB consulting.

"I believe in execution over theory, clarity over noise, and building things that create real impact."

🏢
Glorify Digital — Founder
SEO · Social Media Marketing · Paid Ads · Content Strategy. Real clients. Measurable results. Built from zero.
🎓
BBA · Allenhouse Group of Institutions
2025–2028 · Kanpur, India. Active in competitions, speaking events, and entrepreneurship ecosystems.
🧠

A roadmap, not just a goal. Building analytical rigour, case-solving, and leadership profile for top consulting firms.
📍

Track Record

Where the Work
Actually Happened

Every role shaped a lens. Finance gave me trust. Sales gave me discipline. Founding gave me everything else.

01
Finance & Loan Department
Early Career · On-Ground Role
Handled real client portfolios and financial product conversations from day one. Built deep intuition around trust-based selling, client communication, and financial product understanding — skills no classroom teaches at this speed.
Client HandlingFinancial ProductsTrust Selling
02
Sales Executive
Reliance · Field Sales
Ground-level sales execution at one of India's largest conglomerates. Learned customer psychology, objection handling, and what it means to be revenue-driven. Generated ₹19,500+ in direct sales. Numbers don't lie.
Direct SalesCustomer PsychologyRevenue ExecutionCertified
03
Founder
Glorify Digital · Digital Agency
Built a digital marketing agency from scratch. Delivered measurable growth across real clients through SEO, paid campaigns, social media strategy, and content systems. Early-stage but execution-first.

Case Studies

Proof Over
Promises

Three real problems. Three executed strategies. Three results that speak for themselves.

Client · Fitness
01
Gym Client Lead Growth
3×
Leads in 30 Days
Problem
Local gym struggling with stagnant walk-ins despite strong offline reputation. Zero structured digital presence.
Strategy
Built a full-funnel Instagram presence with transformation content, local hashtag targeting, and referral incentive loop.
Execution
30-day content calendar, Meta lead-gen ads with ₹1,500 test budget, landing page optimisation, daily response management.
Result
3× increase in qualified leads within 30 days. Cost-per-lead reduced by 58%. Client retained for ongoing management.
Client · eCommerce
02
eCommerce Brand Sales Growth
110%
Instagram-Driven Sales
Problem
eCommerce brand with good products but no social strategy. Instagram dormant, website traffic minimal.
Strategy
Repositioned brand voice, built consistent visual identity, and designed content system mixing product posts, UGC reels, and story funnels.
Execution
Weekly content drops, DM automation for warm leads, bio link optimisation, retargeting ads for cart abandoners.
Result
110% increase in Instagram-attributed sales. Follower engagement tripled. Profile visits up 4× within 45 days.
Direct · Sales
03
Direct Sales Execution
₹19.5K
Revenue Generated
Problem
Ground-level sales role requiring individual quota achievement in a competitive, price-sensitive consumer market.
Strategy
Mapped customer segments, prioritised high-intent leads, and designed conversation framework built on product education over hard selling.
Execution
Daily prospecting targets, consistent follow-ups, trust-first conversations, and systematic objection handling using real-world customer psychology.
Result
Generated ₹19,500+ in direct revenue. Certified by Reliance. Built the foundation for understanding revenue at the most granular level.
